channel.title: Translation on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Translation on Pi Stack

item.title: LibreTranslate vs Argos Translate: Self-Hosted Translation Server Guide 2026
item.description: If you need to translate text programmatically but want to avoid sending your data to Google Translate, DeepL, or any cloud-based service, self-hosted translation engines are the answer. In 2026, two open-source projects dominate this space: LibreTranslate and Argos Translate.
